indicators.name: Canopy cover
indicators.definition: Plot-level percent canopy cover from visual estimates, used as one of the main structure indicators.

indicators.name: Adult tree density
indicators.definition: Number of adult tree records per 20 x 20 m plot after excluding cut and dead trees and retaining paper-eligible plots.

indicators.name: Tree height:diameter ratio (log:log)
indicators.definition: Average log-log height-diameter ratio for trees included by the paper's HD filter.

evidence.snippet: mean(log(Height) / log(DBH)) for rows with HD_include == 1

indicators.name: Adult species density
indicators.definition: Count of distinct adult tree species in each plot.

evidence.snippet: number of unique adult species per Plot_code

indicators.name: Adult late-successional species density
indicators.definition: Count of distinct mature-forest adult species per plot after joining species traits.

evidence.snippet: number of unique adult species per plot where Habt_New == 'Mature'

indicators.name: Community similarity to benchmark rainforest
indicators.definition: Bray-Curtis similarity of each plot's adult-species composition to benchmark plots, scaled as 100 * (1 - average Bray-Curtis distance to benchmarks).

evidence.snippet: Bray-Curtis similarity of each plot's adult-species composition to benchmark plots, scaled as 100 * (1 - average Bray-Curtis distance to benchmarks).

indicators.name: Sapling density
indicators.definition: Total counted seedlings and saplings per 5 x 5 m subplot.

indicators.name: Sapling native fraction
indicators.definition: Fraction of sapling abundance contributed by non-introduced species.

indicators.name: Sapling species density
indicators.definition: Count of sapling species entries per plot; in the Osuri table this is effectively sapling species richness.

evidence.snippet: number of recorded sapling species rows per Plot_code

indicators.name: Sapling late-successional species density
indicators.definition: Count of mature-forest sapling species per plot.

evidence.snippet: number of sapling species rows where Habt_New == 'Mature'

indicators.name: Aboveground carbon storage
indicators.definition: Per-tree carbon is estimated from wood density, DBH, and height using the Chave-style allometry implemented in the paper's R script, then summed and scaled to Mg/ha.

evidence.snippet: Per-tree carbon is estimated from wood density, DBH, and height using the Chave-style allometry implemented in the paper's R script, then summed and scaled to Mg/ha.

indicators.name: Distance to contiguous forest
indicators.definition: Isolation covariate used in the paper's Active-vs-Passive interaction models; not itself one of the 11 response indicators.

indicators.name: Meta canopy height
indicators.definition: External satellite-derived structural analogue sampled at Osuri plot locations from the Meta canopy asset used in this project.

evidence.snippet: External satellite-derived structural analogue sampled at Osuri plot locations from the Meta canopy asset used in this project.

indicators.name: Alpha Earth embedding similarity to benchmark
indicators.definition: External embedding-space analogue computed by comparing each plot's Alpha Earth vector to the benchmark centroid.

evidence.snippet: External embedding-space analogue computed by comparing each plot's Alpha Earth vector to the benchmark centroid.
